# TechJournal (techjournal.it) - LLM & Agent Access Guide

Site: https://www.techjournal.it
Type: Italian technology news website
Primary language: it-IT
Content type: News, guides, product analysis

---

## Discovery

- Sitemap: https://www.techjournal.it/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://www.techjournal.it/robots.txt
- RSS Feed: https://www.techjournal.it/feed.xml

---

## Machine-readable endpoints

- API catalog: https://www.techjournal.it/.well-known/api-catalog
- Agent skills: https://www.techjournal.it/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json
- Agent card: https://www.techjournal.it/.well-known/agent.json
- API status: https://www.techjournal.it/api/status

---

## API Access

Base: https://www.techjournal.it/api

Documentation: https://www.techjournal.it/docs

Availability:
- Check /api/status before batch requests
- Public read-only data

Recommended rate:
- Max 1 request per second

---

## Content Structure

Article URL pattern:
https://www.techjournal.it/{category}/{slug}

Each article contains:
- title
- author
- publish_date
- updated_date
- category
- tags
- featured_image
- content (HTML)
- structured data (JSON-LD)

---

## Content Negotiation

To retrieve article in markdown:

Header:
Accept: text/markdown

Scope:
- Article pages only

---

## Common Agent Tasks

### 1. Fetch latest articles

Preferred:
- Use RSS feed:
  https://www.techjournal.it/feed.xml

Alternative:
- Parse homepage:
  https://www.techjournal.it/

---

### 2. Read full article

Steps:
1. Retrieve article URL
2. Request with:
   Accept: text/markdown
3. Fallback to HTML if markdown not available

---

### 3. Discover topics

- Use category pages
- Extract tags from article metadata

---

### 4. Monitor updates

- Poll RSS feed periodically
- Compare publish_date

---

## Example Article (normalized JSON)

Example structure an agent should build after parsing:

{
  "title": "Example article title",
  "url": "https://www.techjournal.it/category/example-article",
  "author": "Author Name",
  "publish_date": "2026-04-25T10:00:00+02:00",
  "updated_date": "2026-04-25T12:00:00+02:00",
  "category": "Technology",
  "tags": ["AI", "Apple"],
  "featured_image": "https://www.techjournal.it/image.jpg",
  "content_markdown": "...",
  "content_html": "..."
}

---

## Priority Content

1. Homepage (latest content)
2. Article pages (primary data)
3. Category pages (navigation)
4. Price Radar (secondary structured data)

---

## Crawling Guidelines

- Respect robots.txt
- Prefer canonical URLs
- Avoid duplicate query parameters
- Do not crawl pagination aggressively

---

## Notes for AI Agents

- Prefer markdown for NLP tasks
- Use JSON-LD when available for metadata
- Use RSS for freshness
- Validate API availability before automated workflows
